positive: A minimalist, whimsical arrangement of celestial bodies and flora. Center composition featuring a stylized crescent moon embracing clusters of glowing lavender flowers and delicate geometric constellations. Soft bioluminescent glow emanating from the elements. Palette is deep midnight blue, soft lavender, warm gold, and ethereal white. High contrast silhouettes against a gradient deep sky background. Clean linework, decorative symmetrical arrangement, elegant, vaporwave celestial aesthetic. Highly detailed, concept art, print design, vector art style, centered and repeatable pattern elements.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, logo, signature, watermark, lowres, grain, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, messy, messy lines
